summary: Screen recording of a @realDonaldTrump tweet with an embedded video. The embedded video shows a gray U.S. Navy destroyer flying a U.S. flag underway on open water, then firing an orange tracer beam that strikes an incoming drone in a burst of flame. A small picture-in-picture in the bottom-right shows Trump at a desk gesturing. A voiceover says 'Bop, bop, bop, bop, ok we have it in our sight. Fire boom!'

script.scene: Screen-recorded Trump tweet (avatar and 'Donald J. Trump @realDonaldTrump'); embedded video shows a gray Navy destroyer flying a U.S. flag underway on open water under a bright sun, a small drone in the sky. Inset PIP of Trump at a desk gesturing.
The drone moves toward the warship; sunny seascape, Trump PIP still bottom-right. VO: 'Bop, bop, bop, bop, ok we have it in our sight.'
The destroyer fires an orange tracer beam that hits the drone in a burst of flame. VO: 'Fire boom!' Trump PIP at the desk.

notable_text: Bop, bop, bop, bop, ok we have it in our sight. Fire boom!
